mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certification_posts( user_id, challenge_participant_id, contents, certification_image, certification_image_url ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{challengeParticipantId}, #{contents}, regexp_replace(#{thumbnailImage}, '^.*/', ''), -- URL 마지막 '/' 이후 = UUID 파일명 #{thumbnailImage} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.status, c.host_id, c.cert_start_time, c.cert_end_time, c.feed_visibility FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification_posts WHERE challenge_participant_id = #{challengeParticipantId} AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM certification_posts p WHERE p.challenge_participant_id = cp.id AND p.created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE ) ) AS certified_challenge_count, COUNT(*) AS in_progress_challenge_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants hosted_cp ON hosted_cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges hosted_c ON hosted_c.id = hosted_cp.challenge_id WHERE hosted_c.host_id = #{userId} AND hosted_c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= date_trunc('day', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') AND p.created_at < date_trunc('day', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') + INTERVAL '1 day' ) AS hosted_today_certification_post_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants hosted_cp ON hosted_cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges hosted_c ON hosted_c.id = hosted_cp.challenge_id WHERE hosted_c.host_id = #{userId} AND hosted_c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND p.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS hosted_pending_certification_post_count FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO certification_post_images (post_id, stored_filename, image_url, sort_order) VALUES
(#{postId}, regexp_replace(#{url}, '^.*/', ''), #{url}, #{i})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS author_profile_image_url, COALESCE(latest_verification.status = 'APPROVED', false) AS author_badge_approved, p.contents, p.certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url, p.certification_status AS status, p.rejection_reason AS rejection_reason, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.created_at FROM certification_posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT status FROM user_verifications WHERE user_id = p.user_id ORDER BY applied_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_verification ON true WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT image_url FROM certification_post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT user_id FROM certification_posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND role = 'ADMIN' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.certification_status AS status, p.user_id AS author_id, c.host_id AS host_id FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET certification_status = 'REJECTED', rejection_reason = #{reason}, rejected_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId} AND certification_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.user_id AS author_id, cp.challenge_id AS challenge_id, c.host_id AS host_id FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT created_at::date FROM certification_posts WHERE challenge_participant_id = #{challengeParticipantId} AND certification_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY created_at::date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET contents = #{contents}, certification_image_url = #{thumbnailImage}, certification_status = 'PENDING', rejection_reason = NULL, rejected_at = NULL, approval_type = NULL WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM certification_post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certification_post_like (post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (post_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM certification_posts WHERE id = #{postId}
